teachesLevels.label: Level 1: adding decimal distances across multiple road segments to find a total journey distance
Level 2: subtraction of decimals with a missing segment shown as "?"
Level 3: comparison of two distances from a common point with three scaffolded input rows
Level 1: recognising and targeting acute, right, obtuse, straight and reflex angles by sight
Level 2: missing angles in sector diagrams that sum to 90°, 180°, or 360°
Level 3 (coming soon): angle reasoning without visual hints using pure calculation questions

manifest.name: Loci Complex
manifest.description:
WHAT IT DOES:
An interactive space for exploring loci — the paths traced by points that move under geometric rules (fixed distance from a point, from a line, and more).

PARTNER SITE:
This experience is built and hosted at locicomplex.com. You can play it inside the library or open it in a new browser tab if the embed stays blank (some sites block framing).

WHAT IT TEACHES:
– Intuition for circle, line, and combined loci
– How constraints on a moving point shape its path
– Visual links between compass constructions and locus problems

TIP:
If you only see an empty frame, tap "New tab" — the game will run in a full window.
